description: Simple and elegant, these gladiator sandals from puma epitomise minimalistic class. For those who are not fans of over the top embellishments, this pair is the right foot-style choice. Wear this with off-duty ensembles.UpperSynthetic silver footbed, ergonomically curved for absolute comfort and styleSoft leather thong straps; two ankle straps and two criss crossing midfoot straps with velcro closureOutsoleTPU outsole with branded grooves and an upraised heelSandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
